challenge.title: Korak 4
challenge.description:
Ispod glavnog zaglavlja stranice, nalazi se navigacioni deo koji uključuje linkove za svaki blog post.

Ovaj deo treba da bude pokriven elementom nav kako bi pokazao svoju svrhu kao navigacionog indikatora.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Welcome to Camperbot's Blog

Navigation

  • My Journey
  • Accessibility
  • Next Steps

My Journey Learning to Code

I started learning to code a few months ago and it's been a wild ride!

Early Challenges

At first, syntax was really confusing.

Breakthroughs

Eventually things started to click.

Accessibility Matters

Today I learned that not everyone uses the web the same way I do.

Screen Readers

These tools help visually impaired users browse websites.

What's Next?

I'm excited to dive into JavaScript and build interactive features!

Coming soon: My first JavaScript project!

Stay tuned for some exciting interactive blog features.

Contact Me

Email me at camperbot@blog.io

tests.text: <h2>Navigation</h2> bi trebalo da bude unutar elementa od nav.
Vaš element za ul treba biti unutar elementa nav.
Vaši elementi/komponente za li bi trebalo da budu unutar elementa ul.
tests.testString:
const liElements = document.querySelectorAll("nav ul li");
assert.isAtLeast(liElements.length, 3);

tests.text: Ne smete dodavati dodatne elemente za ul, li ili h2.
